name: MAC-10 | 鸣沙
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been custom painted using desert camouflage and environments as inspiration. A scarab has been painted under the wire form butt. \"WE'VE BEEN SET UP! THEY'RE EVERYWHERE!\"
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器以沙漠伪装和环境为灵感进行了自定义涂装。尾部的枪托下绘制了一只圣甲虫。 “我们被算计了！他们布下了天罗地网！”
